title: Supply Chain Manager - Delhivery - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Delhivery - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Delhivery. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Supply Chain Manager to strengthen our Nashik-based team.

About Delhivery:
Delhivery is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Delhivery!
